title: linum perenne subsp. lewisii
intro: Linum perenne subsp. lewisii, also known as the Lewis flax or American flax, is a subspecies of the perennial flax plant (Linum perenne) that is native to North America. It is a plant that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linum perenne subsp. lewisii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting skin health, making it a popular natural remedy for skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis. Linum perenne subsp. lewisii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
